rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks inside component implementation scope for signal flow requirements
Use assign statements to bind output features to input features through connections
Do not use assume or guarantee statements in implementation scope
Use exact current-case names from the model index for identifiers
generic_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks inside component implementation scope for implementation-level bindings
Use assign statements to bind output features to input features through connections
Do not use assume or guarantee statements in implementation scope
Use exact current-case names from the model index for identifiers
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use assign output = expression; syntax for implementation-level bindings
AGREE annex blocks are written inside annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
AGREE expressions may only reference identifiers visible in the current component scope
anti_patterns: Do not use assume or guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless the model exposes explicit typed ports or constants
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
